lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Who was the king of Persia?
answers: King Xerxes
King Cyrus
King Darius
King Saul

questions.text: What was Esther chosen to be?
answers: Queen of Persia
A servant to the king
A dancer for the king
Queen of Israel

questions.text: How did Mordecai save the life of King Xerxes?
answers: He reported that the king's guards planned to kill him
He fought off attackers with a sword
He warned the king that his drink was poisoned
He gave the king medicine when he was sick

questions.text: How did Mordecai make Haman angry?
answers: He refused to bow to him
He spoke badly about him
He made fun of him
He stole money from him

questions.text: What permission did Xerxes give Haman?
answers: To destroy all the Jews
To become king
To throw Mordecai in prison
To throw a parade for himself

questions.text: Why was Esther afraid to go to the king?
answers: She could be sent to death if she went uninvited
Xerxes was in a bad mood
She had a big fight with Xerxes the day before
She was afraid of Haman

questions.text: What did Xerxes do when he couldn’t sleep?
answers: He had the royal records read to him
He went for a walk
He called for Esther
He ate a snack

questions.text: What happened when Xerxes asked Haman how to honor someone?
answers: Haman suggested a parade and had to lead it for Mordecai
Haman asked to sit on the king's throne
Mordecai had to lead a parade to celebrate Haman
Haman asked to wear the king's crown, but Xerxes put it on Mordecai

questions.text: What did Esther ask the king at her feast?
answers: For her people, the Jews, to be saved from Haman
For a parade to be put on in her honor
For Haman to be sent to prison
To let Esther and her people go back to Israel

questions.text: What did Xerxes give Mordecai, and what did he do with it?
answers: His signet ring, and Mordecai made a law for the Jews to defend themselves
A crown, and Mordecai became a prince
A sword and Mordecai led an army
His horse, and Mordecai led a parade
